title: J Med Microbiol -- Papers in Press Articles (date view)
bodyHtml:

Journal of Medical Microbiology : Last updated January 27, 2011 [View by subject]

Below is a list of all papers that are currently in press (i.e. accepted, awaiting processing or awaiting proofing) for publication. Please note that the abstracts and PDFs are derived from authors' accepted manuscripts and that titles and content are liable to change during preparation for publication. For information on our policy on author self-archiving of this content, please click here.

These papers may be cited in the following form:

Whitlock, G. C., Valbuena, G. A., Popov, V. L., Judy, B. M., Estes, D. M. & Torres, A. G. (2009). Burkholderia mallei cellular interactions in a respiratory cell model. J Med Microbiol (in press). doi:10.1099/jmm.0.007724-0

Receive updates by email: [Sign up for eTOCs]

To see an article, click its [PDF] link. To review many abstracts, check the boxes to the left of the titles you want, and click the 'Get All Checked Abstract(s)' button. To see one abstract at a time, click its [Abstract] link.
